name: Ashes of the Stars
explicitMods: 9% increased Experience Gain of Gems
+1 to Level of all Skill Gems
+30% to Quality of all Skill Gems
flavourText: A single facet contains the wisdom
of countless disintegrated worlds.

name: Foulborn Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: No Physical Damage
18% increased Attack Speed
+395 to Accuracy Rating
Attacks with this Weapon have 100% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances

flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

We pierce our sides.
But in the great freeze we are forged anew.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side using Smite of Divine Judgement, ignoring weapon restrictions. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.

Can use Items requiring up to Level 100
Minion deals 76% more Damage
